experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Senior Software Engineer and Technical Product Owner on the Personalization Team. I lead the design, development, and deployment of machine learning-driven personalization solutions, spanning technical leadership, product strategy, and hands-on engineering.
highlights: Built and maintain key personalization models: CLV, Channel Affinity, Expected Date of Next Order, Next Best Product, and Personalized Send Time using Python, Django, PySpark, Airflow, EMR, and Terraform.
Developed and maintain the RFM feature, the top-selling feature in Klaviyo's KDP and MA offering.
Led development of Expected Date of Next Cross Sell and Next Best Product models, from design to production deployment.
Leading development of a Personalized Send Time Optimization system to improve customer engagement.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Contributed to internal tools and data integrations supporting advertising and inventory optimization for products sold on Amazon.com.
highlights: Designed and built manual advertising campaign controls for granular campaign management.
Led development of automated campaign controls that dynamically respond to stock status, improving efficiency and reducing waste.
Integrated Inventory Forecast data into the broader data pipeline and built an asynchronous process to upload it reliably at scale.

experience.title: Software Engineer III
experience.description: Designed, developed, and deployed core backend services for personalization, pricing, and promotions. Led service architecture, wrote production-grade code, and collaborated with platform engineering for scalability and high availability.
highlights: Designed and built the Segment Membership Service from the ground up—a RESTful service for verifying customer/product segment membership, deployed to AWS and used in production.
Led the design and code reviews for the Cart Validation Engine (promotion eligibility, promotion codes), deployed to AWS.
Partnered with platform engineering on multi-region architecture, developing recovery strategies and data synchronization plans that were successfully deployed to production.
Led architectural design for Chewy's next-generation pricing engine and contributed to implementation and code review.

experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.description: Built scalable internal platforms for non-technical stakeholders to manage promotions and customer segmentation. Contributed to backend service design and frontend integration.
highlights: Led the design and build of the SQL statement builder engine and APIs for the Segment Management Service; migrated from on-prem to AWS (Nebula 2).
Led the design and implementation of the Cart Validation Model and migration from legacy Java-based promotions; built the React-based Promotion Authoring Platform and deployed it to production.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer I
experience.description: SDE on the Movement Services team. Lead engineer for the service that manages maintenance activities at Amazon fulfillment centers.
highlights: The service uses AWS tools including SWF, DynamoDB, and S3 for managing, scheduling, and storing maintenance activities on fulfillment center floors.

experience.company: Northeastern University College of Computer and Information Sciences
experience.title: Fundamentals of Computer Science II TA
experience.description: Oversaw students' hands-on work with basic computer science concepts and Java. Led workshops on functional and object-oriented Java and provided office hours for one-on-one help.

experience.title: Software Development Co-op
experience.description: Used C# to create support tools that monitor the company's OMS trading service and record trading data to ensure reliability.
highlights: The tools export recorded data in JSON format. Designed a command-line version of the consistency support tool and wrote documentation for it.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Developed web crawlers to scrape millions of websites for varied, irregularly formatted data (emails, phone numbers, addresses) with multi-threading for efficiency.
highlights: The crawlers interacted with an API to retrieve URLs and push scraped data as valid JSON. Built screen-capture and report-generation tools.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Updated the look of various stores' True Fit applications with HTML and CSS. Built a RESTful File Library API for True Fit's large file system in Scala.
highlights: Added features to True Fit's test website in Scala to help ensure the quality of the web application.

projects.title: 🧪 Blobert: Lab Escape Slime
projects.description: A cozy 2.5D experimental platformer about mutation, physical experimentation, and elastic game feel.

projects.title: ⚡ LLM-Charge
projects.description: TypeScript platform for hybrid local/cloud LLM routing, cost tracking, workflows, and automation—supercharge Ollama and friends while cutting API spend.

projects.title: 🧙 MTG Buylist Builder
projects.description: A tool for building and managing Magic: The Gathering card buylists with price tracking, multiple saved lists, and bulk operations.
